<!-- Margince PR template. The craftsmanship gate + DCO check run automatically;
     see CONTRIBUTING.md. Fill every section — INTAKE is part of the review. -->

## What
<!-- The change, in one or two sentences. -->

## Why
<!-- The problem this solves or the need it addresses. Link the issue. -->

## How verified
<!-- Tests added/updated, `make check` green, manual checks. Be specific. -->

## AI involvement
<!-- Disclose proportionately: "assisted" (AI-helped, you directed) or
     "generated" (AI produced substantial portions you reviewed and own). -->

## Accountability
- [ ] **I can explain every line of this change.**
- [ ] Every commit is signed off (DCO: `git commit -s`).
- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md` `## Craftsmanship` and ran the pre-submit self-check.
- [ ] The PR is scoped and tells a story (no unrelated changes).
